nodes.title: StyleModelApply (Redux - Set style_strength to 0 to Disable)
StyleModelApply (Redux - Set style_strength to 0 to Disable)

widgets_values:
GEMINI_Manual_CR_Model_Switch.json

Goal: Test if manual control of CR Model Input Switch avoids loop.
- WaveSpeed nodes (36 & 37) ARE ACTIVE.
- Latent Input Switch (WAS - Node 71) handles latent source (controlled by Node 70).
- Model Path Switch is 'CR Model Input Switch' (Node 77) - CONTROLLED MANUALLY VIA ITS WIDGET.
  - Txt2Img (Node 70=true, Node 77 Input widget=1): Model -> WaveSpeed -> MSFlux -> CR Switch -> KSampler.
  - Img2Img (Node 70=false, Node 77 Input widget=2): Model -> WaveSpeed -> CR Switch -> KSampler.

To Test Txt2Img:
1. Set 'Input Mode' (Node 70) to TRUE.
2. Set 'CR Model Input Switch' (Node 77) widget 'Input' to 1.
3. In KSampler (Node 3), set 'denoise' to 1.0.
4. Ensure MSFlux (72) width/height match EmptyLatent (69).
5. Run.

REDUX USAGE:
- To enable FLUX.1 Redux styling, ensure a Redux reference image is loaded (Node 84) and set 'style_strength' on 'StyleModelApply (Redux)' (Node 88) to a value > 0 (e.g., 1.0).
- To disable Redux, set 'style_strength' on Node 88 to 0.0.

nodes.title: FONTE DO UPSCALE: (True=Pós-Detalhes / False=Direto do VAE)
CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A young adult man with an athletic build stands shirtless in a narrow hallway, his dense dark hair neatly trimmed and his strong jawline accentuated by a well-groomed beard; his skin is smooth and healthy, with natural tonality and visible pores across his defined chest and arms. Facing him closely is another young adult man with an athletic build, positioned against the wall, wearing a partially unzipped black cotton hoodie that reveals his toned upper chest; his thick, textured brown hair is styled with a slight wave, and his clean-shaven face showcases firm skin and a sharp profile. Both men are centered in a mid-frame, eye to eye, their confident postures and subtle intensity conveying a sense of focused, unspoken tension. The indoor setting features matte off-white walls and a wooden doorframe in the background, lit by soft overhead lighting that casts gentle shadows and enhances the natural skin tones. The color palette is muted and realistic, with rich textures preserved in the fabric and skin. Captured with hyperdetailed texture, 8K master quality, gigapixel supersample, 16-bit ProPhoto RGB, and a subtle film grain overlay resembling a Kodak Portra 800 color profile. Filename: IMG\_7289.CR3, shot on Sony A7R V 50mm f/1.2 GM.
